info.title: Open Rentals
info.description: API for open rental platform with property listings and applications

get.description:
Health check endpoint for container orchestration and load balancers.

Returns:
    dict: Health status with service availability information

post.description:
Register a new user.

- **email**: Unique email address
- **password**: Minimum 8 characters with uppercase and digit
- **first_name**: User's first name
- **last_name**: User's last name
- **role**: User role (renter, landlord)

Authenticate user and return JWT tokens.

Uses OAuth2 password flow. Provide username (email) and password.

Authenticate user with JSON body and return JWT tokens.

Alternative to OAuth2 form login.
Refresh access token using a valid refresh token.

Request a password reset email.

If the email exists in the system, a password reset link will be sent.
For security, we always return success even if email doesn't exist.
Reset password using a valid reset token.

put.description:
Update current user's profile.

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

patch.description:
Update current user's profile.

All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

post.description:
Change current user's password.

Requires current password for verification.

get.description:
Get a user's public profile.

Returns limited information suitable for public display.

List all users (admin only).

Supports filtering by role and active status.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users  Get

post.description:
Mark a landlord as verified (admin only).

This is a key anti-fraud feature.

Create a new property listing.

Requires landlord or admin role.

get.description:
List and search properties with filters.

Supports:
- Geo-search within radius using PostGIS
- Price, bedroom, bathroom filters
- Property type and neighborhood filters
- Sorting by price, date, or distance
- Pagination

Get a single property by ID.

Increments view count for active properties.

patch.description:
Update a property listing.

Only the property owner or an admin can update.

put.description:
Update a property listing.

Only the property owner or an admin can update.

delete.description:
Delete a property listing.

Only the property owner or an admin can delete.

get.description:
Get a single property by slug.

The slug must be lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

post.description: Publish a draft property (set status to pending_review or active).
Add an image to a property.

delete.description: Delete an image from a property.

post.description: Approve a pending property (set to active) - admin only.

get.description:
List applications based on user role.

- Renters see their own submitted applications
- Landlords see applications received for their properties
- Admins see all applications

post.description:
Submit a rental application for a property.

- Applicant cannot apply to their own property
- Cannot apply to inactive properties
- Cannot apply twice to the same property

get.description: Get applications received for landlord's properties.

Get a single application by ID.

Accessible by the applicant or the property owner.

patch.description:
Update an application (by the applicant only).

Can only update pending or under_review applications.

delete.description: Delete an application (by the applicant, only if withdrawn).

post.description:
Update application status (by landlord).

Landlord can:
- Move to under_review
- Approve or deny the application

put.description:
Update application status (by landlord).

Landlord can:
- Move to under_review
- Approve or deny the application

get.description: Get all applications for a specific property (landlord only).

ApplicationCreate.title: ApplicationCreate
ApplicationCreate.description: Schema for creating a rental application.

ApplicationStatusUpdate.title: ApplicationStatusUpdate
ApplicationStatusUpdate.description: Schema for landlord updating application status.

ApplicationUpdate.title: ApplicationUpdate
ApplicationUpdate.description: Schema for updating a rental application (by applicant).

ResetPasswordRequest.title: ResetPasswordRequest
ResetPasswordRequest.description: Request to reset password with token.

UserPublicResponse.title: UserPublicResponse
UserPublicResponse.description: Public user info (for landlord profiles, etc.).
